hero.badge: Trusted platform for renters and providers
hero.headline: Storage space,
hero.subtext: Find, book, and manage secure storage units near you — in minutes. Whether you're moving, decluttering, or scaling your business.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Enter city, neighbourhood, or postal code…

howItWorks.title: Book a unit in four simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No paperwork, no queues — everything happens online from start to finish.

steps.title: Search & filter
steps.desc: Enter your location and set requirements — size, price, and duration — to get matched with verified options nearby.

steps.title: Compare & choose
steps.desc: Browse detailed listings with photos, features, availability and transparent pricing. No hidden fees.

steps.title: Book instantly
steps.desc: Reserve your unit and pay securely online. Receive instant confirmation and access instructions.

steps.title: Move in & manage
steps.desc: Access your space anytime. Track inventory digitally and manage your rental from your dashboard.

items.name: Secure Basement Storage
items.description: Spacious and secure basement storage unit ideal for urban households and small businesses. Climate-controlled environment keeps your belongings safe year-round. Accessible 24 hours, 7 days a week via digital lock.

items.name: Covered Garage Space
items.description: Premium covered garage with 24/7 security guard and gated entry. Perfect for vehicle storage, large equipment, or business inventory. Loading dock available.

items.name: Spare Room Crate Storage
items.description: Compact and affordable storage solution in a residential spare room. Clean, dry, and lockable. Ideal for personal items, seasonal equipment, or small inventory.

items.name: Climate-Controlled Warehouse Bay
items.description: Industrial warehouse bay with full climate control, forklift access, and a dedicated loading dock. Perfect for businesses needing reliable, large-scale storage.

items.name: Compact Mini-Storage Locker
items.description: Ultra-affordable mini locker in a secure indoor facility. Perfect for documents, valuables, and personal items. Fully digital access with PIN code.

items.name: Commercial Storage Pod
items.description: Modern commercial storage pod with vehicle access. Waterproof construction, CCTV coverage, and round-the-clock availability. Great for medium-sized businesses.

features.title: Built around trust & convenience
features.subtitle: Every feature is designed so you can store with confidence and complete clarity.

items.title: Verified listings only
items.desc: Every storage provider is vetted before going live. You'll never encounter a ghost listing or unresponsive host.

items.title: Secure payments
items.desc: All transactions are encrypted and protected. Funds are held securely until move-in is confirmed.

items.title: Digital inventory tracking
items.desc: Log and monitor everything you store with our inventory tool. Know exactly what's in your unit at any time.

items.title: Instant booking
items.desc: No calls, no waiting. Reserve your unit in minutes and receive your access details immediately.

items.title: Real-time availability
items.desc: Listings are updated in real time. If a unit shows as available, it is — no double-booking frustrations.

items.title: Dedicated support
items.desc: Our customer support team is available 7 days a week to assist with any booking queries.

items.text: Found the perfect unit for my business inventory in under 10 minutes. The whole process — from search to moving in — was seamless.
items.name: Rajan Krishnamurthy

items.text: Moving apartments and needed temporary storage. RentWise gave me options I didn't know existed in my neighbourhood. Saved me so much stress.
items.name: Priya Meenakshi

items.text: As a storage provider, RentWise has doubled my occupancy. The platform takes care of everything so I can focus on maintaining quality spaces.
items.name: Venkat Suresh

cta.title: Your perfect storage space is waiting.
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of individuals and businesses who've simplified their storage with RentWise.

footer.tagline: Connecting people to safe, affordable storage spaces across India — simply and securely.
